prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish: El mejor momento para sembrar un árbol fue hace veinte años. Ahora es el segundo mejor momento. 
Note: This translation maintains the core message about the benefits of taking action sooner rather than later, using the metaphor of planting a tree.

French: Le moment idéal pour planter un arbre était il y a vingt ans. Le deuxième meilleur moment est maintenant.
Note: Like the Spanish, this French version expresses the idea of the value of acting promptly, even if we missed the optimal opportunity in the past. The tree remains the symbolic central focus.
